conservative.name: Unholy Invocation
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon, engaged with target. Move the token on the Eye of the Gods tracker 1 space to the left

success.description: You call upon the power of the Dark Gods as you attack. As the runes of Chaos inscribed on your weapon taste the blood of your enemy, they glow with searing energy in answer to your prayers. You hit the target for normal damage, and the target gains either the Cowed or Rattled condition (your choice) for 1 round
As above, the target gains the Overwhelmed condition for 1 round

chaosStar.description: The Chaos gods are displeased. Gain the Staggered condition and add 1 recharge token to it, plus 1 per rolled

reckless.name: Storm of Red Ruin
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon or talons, engaged with target, the token on the Eye of the Gods tracker must be on space 7 or below

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage

As above, plus draw 1 card from the wound deck. You inflict extra damage equal to the card's Severity Rating (if you draw a card with Severity X, draw 2 additional cards and total their Severity then add 1 recharge token to this card). Discard any wound cards drawn, with no further effect. Move the token on the Eye of the Gods tracker 1 space to the right
